title: 3D Books
description: Adds custom 3D model to all book types
body:
This resource pack adds unique 3D models for all types of books in Minecraft 1.21.4! Now every book in the game has a realistic and distinct appearance. Perfect for players who appreciate detail and immersion in the game world!

🔹 Features:                                                                                          
✔️ New 3D models for all book types                                                                     
✔️ High-quality textures that match Minecraft’s style                                                   
✔️ Compatible with versions 1.13-1.21.5                                                                    
✔️ No gameplay impact – purely visual enhancement
